allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''assets/grunt_art.png''\); w,h = img.size; print\(f''Size: {w}x{h}''\); print\(f''8 cols: {w}/8 = {w/8}''\); print\(f''4 rows: {h}/4 = {h/4}''\); print\(f''Clean? w%8={w%8}, h%4={h%4}''\)")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''assets/heavy_art.png''\); w,h = img.size; print\(f''Size: {w}x{h}''\); print\(f''8 cols: {w}/8 = {w/8}, clean: {w%8==0}''\); print\(f''4 rows: {h}/4 = {h/4}, clean: {h%4==0}''\)")
